hero.subheadline: The intelligent assistant that combines coach-athlete communication, workout data and session feedback, turning insights into action and giving you time for what matters most.

connects.headline: Connects seamlessly with your apps and devices

empower.body: Too many coaching tools focus on plans, not people. Messages scatter across platforms. Context gets lost. And important signals go unnoticed in the noise.
empower.highlight: augo brings everything together - combining athlete data, feedback, and trends into a single view that helps you coach better.

panels.headline:
Instant insights
with full athlete context
panels.body: augo stores and remembers every athlete conversation, session feedback, and workout data. Ask the intelligent assistant anything and get instant answers with full athlete context.
panels.tagline: No more searching through buried calendar notes or scrolling through messages histories to remember when your athlete mentioned that knee discomfort.

panels.headline:
Know exactly who
needs you today
panels.body: augo surfaces the athletes who need attention right now: early warning signs from training data & session feedback, schedule changes requests, sessions flagged for review, key moments where your input matters most.
panels.tagline: Start each day with clarity & focus.

panels.headline:
Know how your
athletes really feel
panels.body: augo captures post-session feedback, providing the coach visibility on long-term wellbeing trends, helping you spot subtle changes that signal challenges ahead.
panels.tagline: Catch fatigue, motivation dips, or early injury signs while there's still time to act.

integration.headline: augo works with what you already use
integration.body: You keep TrainingPeaks for workout planning. Athletes keep their Garmin or Coros. augo sits in the middle, connecting everything with centralized communication and intelligent insights.

athletes.sectionHeadline: Everything your athletes need in one place

panels.headline:
Your dedicated
space to connect
with your coach
panels.body: All messages, session feedbacks and workout data in one place—so you always feel supported, no matter where you are.

panels.headline:
Share how you're
feeling, not just
how you're
performing
panels.body: Log session feedback and share it seamlessly with your coach: energy level, pain, fueling, and how you're feeling. Help your coach understand the complete picture, not just the data coming from your watch.

panels.headline:
Track how
you're really
doing
panels.body: Your feedback isn't just logged: it's visible as trends for both you and your coach. Catch early warning signs together and stay ahead of burnout or injury.

about.body1: augo was founded by Fabi and Bruna, two endurance coaches who also happened to work in tech. As a business analyst and data scientist, they expected their tools to help them coach better.
about.highlight1: Instead, they found themselves drowning in fragmented communication, losing important details, and missing the signals that mattered.
about.body2: So they built augo. Because coaching is hard enough without tools that create more work. We believe AI should support human expertise with the right insights at the right time, helping you do what you do best: understand and develop your athletes.
about.highlight2: Technology that serves coaches, not the other way around
about.body3: In late 2025, Andreas Hermann, a computer scientist and triathlete joined augo as a co-founder. He not only brings in experience as a CTO in a sportstech company but also worked on the same problem as augo did before the three founder met.
about.highlight3: They decided to join forces and Andreas joined augo's mission.

faq.ctaBody: The intelligent assistant that combines data with human context, turning insights into action and giving you time for what matters most.
faq.title: FAQ

items.question: When is augo launching?
items.answer: augo is available on the App Store and Google Play for a select group of Beta users as of November 2025. augo will become generally available to all users in March 2026. Access will be released in waves and users on the waitlist will have special pricing. Athletes can join through their coach.

items.question: How much does augo cost?
items.answer: augo offers flexible pricing plans designed for both coaches and athletes. Waitlist members will receive special early-access pricing. Visit our pricing page or join the waitlist for the latest details.

items.question: What are the benefits of joining the waitlist?
items.answer: Joining the waitlist gives you priority access to augo, special introductory pricing, and the opportunity to shape the product with your feedback during the early-access phase.

items.question: Will augo replace coaches?
items.answer: No. augo is designed to empower coaches, not replace them. It automates repetitive tasks and surfaces actionable insights so coaches can focus on strategy, relationships, and what they do best.

items.question: Can athletes use augo without a coach?
items.answer: Athletes can join augo through their coach. The platform is built around the coach-athlete relationship, enhancing communication and providing data-driven insights for both.

items.question: How does augo's AI analyze workouts?
items.answer: augo's AI processes workout data from popular devices and platforms, combining performance metrics with contextual information to deliver personalized insights and recommendations.

items.question: Why choose augo over AI coaching apps?
items.answer: Unlike standalone AI coaching apps, augo keeps the human coach at the center. It combines the power of AI analysis with human expertise, context, and the personal connection that drives athlete success.

items.question: How does augo handle my data?
items.answer: Your data privacy and security are our top priorities. augo uses industry-standard encryption and never shares your personal data with third parties. You remain in full control of your information.

contact.headline: Questions? Ideas? Let's talk.
contact.body: Whether you're curious about augo, want to share feedback, or just want to connect, we'd love to hear from you.

download.body: Experience the intelligent assistant across web and mobile. Coaches get full access on both platforms. Athletes connect on mobile.

pricing.heroBody: augo organizes your conversations with your athletes, your athletes's workout data, and qualitative session feedback into clear, actionable insights — so you always know who needs attention, what to do, and why.

whyCards.title: Automate the busywork
whyCards.body: Spend less time managing and more time coaching.

whyCards.title: Coach with confidence
whyCards.body: Make better decisions with clear, actionable insights.

faqItems.question: Can I change plans anytime?
faqItems.answer: Yes - upgrade, downgrade, or cancel whenever you want.

faqItems.question: Is there a free trial?
faqItems.answer: You can start with our free plan and upgrade when you're ready.

faqItems.question: Do my athletes need to pay?
faqItems.answer: No - augo is built for coaches. Athletes simply follow your guidance.

faqItems.question: Do I need to cancel my training platform?
faqItems.answer: No - augo works on top of your current tools, helping you organize data and gain clarity across all athletes.

faqItems.question: Are there any additional costs or add-ons?
faqItems.answer: No. There are no hidden fees.

faqItems.question: Which platforms does augo integrate with?
faqItems.answer: We currently support wearable data from Garmin, Polar, Apple Watch, Strava, Coros, Wahoo, and Zwift.

faqItems.question: Can I use augo with multiple sports or coaching styles?
faqItems.answer: Currently augo has been built to address the needs of running, cycling and triathlon coaches. If you'd like to use augo for another sport or coaching area, let's talk!

faqItems.question: What do my athletes see and use?
faqItems.answer: They are able to see their workout data, chat with you, share qualitative feedback, and receive guidance over training plans.

faqItems.question: Do I get a discount on the annual plan?
faqItems.answer: Yes, you save 15% when you commit to an annual plan.

pricing.closingBody: augo gives you the clarity to coach with confidence. Start free today and see what it means to truly know what matters.
